## 🔬 Deep Research
**Cyber Security Services (CSS)** is an independent cybersecurity consulting firm based in Westerville, Ohio, serving U.S. organizations since 2014. They offer penetration testing, virtual CISO, incident response, SOC, and compliance services (SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI) and are an original contributor to the NIST Cybersecurity Framework.
